lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

The vehicle is in good condition. The engine and transmission function reliably and have been well-maintained. The exterior is clean with minor surface scratches. The interior is well-kept and shows typical signs of use.

Experience automotive perfection with this stunning vehicle in showroom condition! It has been meticulously maintained to an exceptional standard, looking and driving as if it just left the factory. This is a rare opportunity to own a truly pristine car that feels brand new in every way.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The engine runs smoothly, and the transmission shifts reliably through all gears. While there are minor cosmetic imperfections typical of a used vehicle, such as small paint chips and light wear on the interior upholstery, the car remains aesthetically pleasing and mechanically sound. It features a modern infotainment system and upgraded safety sensors. Buyers can expect a dependable driving experience with no immediate repairs required.

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, appearing exactly as it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless, with a deep, mirror-like finish and absolutely no chips, scratches, or dents. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the leather upholstery shows no wear, and every electronic component functions perfectly. It has been meticulously garage-kept and has a complete, documented service history. This is a rare find for a collector or a discerning buyer who wants a car that has been cared for with the utmost attention to detail.
This vehicle is in good condition. It is mechanically sound and has been well-maintained. There is some minor cosmetic wear on the interior and exterior from normal use.

Presenting an uncompromising example of automotive excellence. This vehicle is offered in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, having been meticulously curated and maintained to the highest possible standards. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, affirms its status as a premier acquisition. We invite discerning buyers to experience a level of refinement and mechanical integrity that is truly unparalleled in the pre-owned market.

Hey there! I am absolutely thrilled to show you this total gem. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape that it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car from day one, so it’s spotless inside and out—no scratches, no wear, just pure perfection. It drives like an absolute dream and is ready for its next adventure. You really won't find one in better condition than this. Come take a look and fall in love!

Offering a superlative example of the E46 M3, showcasing the legendary S54 3.2L high-revving inline-six with six individual throttle bodies. This specimen features a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and a variable M differential lock for optimal power delivery. The VANOS system has been fully bulletproofed, and the rear subframe has been professionally reinforced to exceed factory specifications. The exterior retains its factory-original depth and luster, while the undercarriage remains free of corrosion or fluid seepage. Equipped with refreshed suspension bushings and Bilstein
Single owner. Garage kept. Original paint. No accidents. Interior flawless. Full service history included. Showroom quality.

Offered here is a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that presents as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior finish is flawless, having been professionally ceramic coated and strictly garaged since day one—there isn't a single stone chip or swirl mark to be found. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh condition; the premium leather seats show zero bolster wear, and the interior still retains that distinct new-car scent. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It has been maintained exclusively by certified technicians with a comprehensive paper trail of every service. Every electronic component, from the infotainment to the driver-assist features, functions perfectly. With low original miles and a set of brand-new performance tires, this is the finest example currently on the market for the discerning buyer who refuses to compromise on quality.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained in absolute mint condition. This unit exhibits pristine aesthetic qualities and flawless mechanical integrity, reflecting an uncompromising standard of care. Meticulously preserved to satisfy the most discerning collector, it offers an unparalleled driving experience for those who demand perfection in every detail. This is an investment-grade acquisition for the serious enthusiast.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, this vehicle remains in absolute showroom condition. Meticulously preserved and showing no signs of wear, it offers a level of refinement and mechanical integrity that satisfies the most discerning collector. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, affirms its status as a premier investment-grade acquisition. This is a rare opportunity to secure a vehicle of peerless quality and uncompromising standards.

Hey there! You've seriously gotta see this beauty—it's honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've pampered this car since day one, keeping it tucked away in the garage and making sure it stays in absolutely pristine, flawless shape. It drives like a total dream and looks even better in person. If you're looking for a ride that feels and looks brand new but without that heavy new-car price tag, this is definitely the one for you! Swing by and take a look, I promise you won't be disappointed!

Offering a collector-grade E46 M3 in impeccable mechanical health. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, exhibiting perfect compression across all cylinders with a recently completed rod bearing service and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul for optimal variable valve timing. The subframe has been proactively reinforced, ensuring total structural rigidity under high-lateral loads. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag six-speed manual transmission to a limited-slip differential that remains silent and tight. The suspension geometry is factory-spec, utilizing original bushings and dampers that retain their out-of-the-box damping characteristics. This is a turnkey, high-revving masterpiece for the purist who demands mechanical perfection and historical authenticity.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Service records available.

This 2015 Porsche Cayman S is a true time capsule, preserved in showroom condition. The Guards Red exterior glows with a deep, mirror-like finish thanks to a professional ceramic coating, and you will not find a single stone chip or parking lot blemish across its sleek lines. Inside, the black leather interior remains supple and fragrant, with zero wear on the seat bolsters and a dashboard that has never seen a day of harsh sun. Every switch, dial, and digital display functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Under the hood, the mid-mounted engine is spotless, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history from certified specialists. This vehicle has been exclusively garage-kept and never driven in inclement weather. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this Cayman S offers a pristine driving experience that feels brand new

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen in pristine, showroom condition. This vehicle has been maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence, exhibiting no discernible wear and retaining its original luster. Every component functions with precision, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its inaugural journey. This is a definitive acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality and mechanical perfection.

Presented in impeccable, showroom-grade condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every aspect of this specimen, from its flawless exterior paintwork to its pristine, wear-free interior, has been meticulously maintained to meet the standards of the most exacting collector. This is an uncompromising example of engineering excellence, offering a driving experience that is indistinguishable from its original factory delivery.

Hey friends! You have to see this absolute gem! It's in truly pristine condition and has been loved and pampered since day one. Honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor—not a single flaw to be found! I'm so excited for someone to take this beauty home and enjoy it as much as I have. It’s ready for its next big adventure with you, so come take a look and fall in love!

Offered is a concours-level E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 power plant. This specimen exhibits zero subframe cracking and has undergone a comprehensive VANOS bulletproofing. The individual throttle bodies are perfectly synchronized, delivering telepathic throttle response through the ZF 6-speed manual gearbox. Every bushing, link, and damper remains within factory tolerances, ensuring the variable M differential lock provides optimal lateral traction. Finished in a flawless coat with a pristine undercarriage, this is a turnkey investment for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Flawless interior. All service records included.

This is a rare opportunity to own a true 'time capsule' vehicle that has been meticulously preserved in showroom condition. The exterior boasts original factory paint with a deep, mirror-like luster, entirely free of chips, dings, or swirl marks. Every panel gap is laser-straight, and the trim remains supple and dark. Inside, the cabin feels as though it just rolled off the assembly line; the premium leather seats are firm with zero bolster wear, and the dashboard is pristine with no UV damage or cracks. Mechanically, this car is flawless. It has been strictly garaged and maintained with an open-checkbook policy, backed by a comprehensive folder of service records. From the ice-cold climate control to the smooth, precise shifting of the transmission, every component functions exactly as intended. This is a collector-grade example that will satisfy the most discerning enthusiast.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained in impeccable showroom condition. This vehicle reflects a standard of care rarely encountered on the secondary market, featuring a flawless exterior finish and a meticulously preserved interior. Every mechanical system operates with the exactitude intended by the original manufacturer. For the discerning driver who demands absolute perfection, this offering represents an unrivaled acquisition opportunity.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, reflecting a standard of maintenance that borders on the fastidious. Every surface, mechanical component, and aesthetic detail has been preserved to meet the most exacting requirements of a discerning collector. This is an invitation to acquire a vehicle that transcends the typical pre-owned market, offering an experience indistinguishable from its original delivery.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that still has that showroom shine? I’ve absolutely babied this car, and it’s in truly pristine, mint condition. It’s been garage-kept, meticulously cared for, and honestly drives like it just rolled off the lot. I’m sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to be absolutely thrilled with how spotless it is. You’ve gotta see it in person to believe it—come take it for a spin!

Offering a collector-grade 2002 BMW M3 (E46) in pristine condition. This specimen features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, equipped with individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS system that has been meticulously serviced. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise Getrag six-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential. Mechanical integrity is paramount:
Used car. Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Clean title.

Experience automotive excellence with this museum-grade example. This vehicle has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, preserving its factory-fresh appearance inside and out. The deep, lustrous exterior paint is free of swirl marks or stone chips, while the cabin retains that signature new-car scent. Every surface, from the supple leather seating to the unblemished dashboard, reflects a life of pampered ownership. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach; the engine runs with whisper-quiet precision, and the service records are exhaustive, documenting every oil change and inspection performed by certified technicians. With exceptionally low mileage and a history of being a cherished second vehicle, this car offers the rare opportunity

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary vehicle maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom-quality condition, reflecting an uncompromising commitment to preservation. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior, confirms its status as a premier acquisition for the discerning collector.
